title: hieracium sylvaticum var. stenstroemii
intro: Hieracium sylvaticum var. stenstroemii, commonly known as the wood hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Hieracium sylvaticum var. stenstroemii include its ability to improve digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
